acceptance_criteria.text: Package renamed to 'takt' in package.json; trello/ directory moved to src/; all internal imports, build scripts, and references updated; bun test passes with no broken imports

src/cli.ts exists with #!/usr/bin/env bun shebang; package.json has bin.takt pointing to it; takt --help prints usage summary; takt --version prints version; unknown commands print error + help; bun link makes takt globally available

takt auth register/login/whoami/logout work: register creates user in DB, login stores session in ~/.takt/config.json with userId+username+dbPath, whoami prints current user, logout removes session; wrong credentials print error and exit 1
All commands except auth register/login, serve, --help/--version require valid session; missing session prints 'Not logged in. Run takt auth login first.' and exits 1
takt serve [--port N] builds UI bundle then starts Bun.serve on given port (default 3001); output says 'Takt running at http://localhost:<port>'; console output says 'Takt' not 'Mini Trello'

Board commands work: list (shows user's boards as table), create (prints new ID), show (prints overview with columns/cards/members), delete (owner only, --yes skips confirm), members, invite, kick, activity [--limit]
Column commands work: list (position order), create (appends, prints ID), update --title, delete (with --yes), reorder (comma-separated IDs)

Card commands work: list [--column], create (with all flags), show (full detail with timeline), update (all flags including checklist helpers --add-check/--toggle-check/--remove-check), delete (--yes), move
Label commands work: list, create --name --color, update, delete, assign cardId labelId, unassign cardId labelId
Comment commands work: add (auto-watches card, prints ID), edit (own only), delete (own only)
takt search <boardId> <query> searches cards by title/description/labels and prints matching cards with column info

Output formatting: aligned text tables, IDs truncated to 8 chars (--full-ids for full), dates as YYYY-MM-DD, ANSI colors (green/red/yellow/cyan), --json flag for raw JSON, --quiet flag for minimal output
DB path resolution: local ./data/kanban.db when in project dir; ~/.takt/config.json dbPath when global; takt serve uses import.meta.dir; clear error if no DB found
